name: Wayn

aspects.high_concept: Ansei of the Cold Sand (His Title / Fame / Identity)
aspects.trouble: WANTED: DEAD OR ALIVE - The Mythless Bandit of Bravil (Empire Hunted).
other_aspects: The Ansei of the Cold Sand (Title).

compel_library.system: Mythless Bounty Heat (Bounty Hunter Ladder, no guard swarm)
compel_library.on_full_clock: Spawn the next bounty hunter from data/bounty_hunters/mythless_bounty_chain.json (by tier). Reset heat to 0. Advance tier by +1 (capped at tier 3).

ideas.title: A Star Too Bright
ideas.when: You manifest the Shehai (or do anything unmistakably 'Ansei') where strangers can describe you later.
ideas.compel_hit: Word travels by coin and caravan. Someone sells a description. Heat rises.

ideas.title: Name in a Ledger
ideas.when: You give your full name/title to officials, innkeepers, stewards, caravan masters, or anyone who keeps records.
ideas.compel_hit: Ledgers don't forget. Someone cross-references a description and a travel record.

ideas.title: Public Scene, Private Price
ideas.when: You win big, insult big, or fight loud in a place with witnesses (market, tavern, yard, street).
ideas.compel_hit: A witness realizes your face is worth money. They don't need a poster to get paid.

ideas.title: Ghost From Bravil
ideas.when: A traveler from Cyrodiil recognizes you, or someone drops the word 'Mythless' in the wrong ear.
ideas.compel_hit: The past breathes. The next hunter gets a lead that feels personal.

ideas.title: Imperial Interest (Without Posters)
ideas.when: You directly cross the Empire (rob, humiliate, expose corruption), and it becomes a story people repeat.
ideas.compel_hit: A professional hears 'CHA-CHING' and starts hunting you for sport and reputation.

ideas.title: Lay Low (Heat Relief)
ideas.when: You choose to go quiet: travel under a false name, avoid heroics, take low-profile work, or disappear for a scene.
ideas.compel_hit: You lose momentum, but you lose heat too.

exceptions.description: Do NOT respond to this Trouble by siccing an entire hold's guard on Wayn. Use the Heat clock and escalating bounty hunters instead.
The Empire does not plaster Skyrim with posters for this. Leads spread by travelers, ledgers, bribed witnesses, and hunter networks.

ability.name: Resist Poison
ability.effect: +2 to Physique rolls to resist poison

power.name: Adrenaline Rush
power.effect: Once per session, ignore all stress boxes for one scene

stunts: Mentor of the Mind: Because Wayn's spent years in self-reflection, running from the wrongdoings of his youth, and coming to a place of peace at last. He now uses his emotional intelligence to help others find much the same. Wayn gains a +2 bonus on Empathy rolls opposed by an NPC's Will when forming a bond with an ally or opposition. On a success, he may name the resulting scene aspect 'Master of the Mind'; while that aspect is in play, Wayn may Overcome with Empathy and use it in the place of Rapport (for that bond/interaction).

Martial Art Maneuvers: Because Wayn is a Sage of the Martial Art, having trained with the Monastic Khajiit,the Dunmer Marshmerrow, and within his own home of Hammerfell studying the Book of Circles with exceedinly profound insight to the point he could manifest a Shehai. When it comes to close quarter's defense he usually need only let his opponents momentum be their downfall. When defending against one enemy within the same zone, and with no other attacking him, Wayn receieves a bonus of +2 to Defend using Fight. On SWS he may waive the boost in exchange for imposing one of three Situation effects on his target for 2 exchanges: 'Weapon Stolen', 'Swordarm taken out - Pressure Point Struck!', 'Throat chopped - Can't breath!'. If he spends 1 FP he may also inflict two physical stress upon his target affected by one of those situation aspects.

Deadly Calm: Because Wayn has complete control over his Mind from years of disciplining it through his training at becoming an Ansei. When he sets his mind upon battle, there's little that can detour his objective. Once per Scene Wayn can Create Advantage with Will focusing in on his opponents, receiving a +2 Bonus on the 4dF, placing the Scene Aspect: 'Deadly Calm' (2 free Invokes). On SWS the first Physical Mild Consequence he takes can be ignored and soaked, as if having an additional box to check.
backstory:
**Civil War Entry**: Wayn's Response: "I drew the short-straw and allied with the Stormcloaks. What is Oblivion do you think, Milk-Drinker? I'm a Sayad Half-breed of Skyrim. My Father was the: 'True Son of Skyrim' type, and Veteran of the Great War, while my Mother was Forebear who fought against the Aldmeri Dominion in Hammerfell when the Empire released us from their protection. Got a long history of Hating the Empire you could say."

**Civil War Stance**: Wayn's Response: "I don't. I support not ending up in the Empire's dungeon in Cyrodil. Took really unkindly when both of my parents demises were correlated to their former loyalties to the Emperor. So right around the time my Mother died in the line of duty leaving behind only a copy of the Five Circles, her journal, and a pension that was then absconded by the Count of Bravil, I decided to establish a little group of my own outside the City limits. Called ourselves: The Mythless Brotherhood. Raked up over a million septim or so, before the might of the Emperor fell onto our heads and forced me to go on the run. Hm.. Guess it wasn't all for not though, it helped me become the Sage I am today, and lead me back to the place that my Father Loved almost as much as my Mother. Think I'll.. Check into those Companions he said he use to run with."

**Motivation**: Wayn's Response: "Hmph, you mean besides stay off the Empire's radar? It's enough to have actually manifested my Shehai, and to be called Ansei, by my Brother's of the Blade. Still, there's the want in me to go further, to be known as a legendary warrior across Skyrim, and to personally be the one to jam a sword into the Empire's heart here in Skyrim, like my fellow Warrior-Wave did to the Dominion in Hammerfell. Other than that, hell, I wouldn't mind doing this Mercenary thing with the Companions as my Father before me."

**Connections**: Wayn's Response: "Other than being born here, no. My Parents moved back to Hammerfell with me when I was ten years of age. My Father always spoke Highly of the Warriors of Jorrvaskr, perhaps I'll enlist! Running pretty low on Septim from my days of righteous crime against the Empire anyhow."
notes:
Created during Session Zero
Refresh spent: 2 (Extra) — Ansei's Shehai of Cold Snow (Artifact Weapon, Level 2/4).

extras.name: Ansei's Shehai of Cold Snow
stunts_locked: Locked Stunt Slot 3 (Significant Milestone: Proving Honor or further.)
Locked Stunt Slot 4 (Significant Milestone: Finish Companions Storyline for Act I.)
extras.drawback: Summoning more than twice per two scenes inflicts 2 mental stress; further summons force Mild mental consequence: 'Weary Soul'.
